goal: Add a side-effect-free permit-prep builder for BPK-080 approved memory cache audit export decisions, producing permit request metadata for a later task while keeping permit issuance, file writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, routes, package, workflow, deployment, and external calls closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, write export files, add durable storage, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, routes, package changes, workflow changes, deployment files, or external calls.
claims: Approved audit export decisions can be converted to permit-prep metadata without issuing a permit.
Ready BPK-080 decision gate and permit prep refs are required.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance and export persistence require later task locks.
dod: Approved, missing permit prep ref, and rejected or blocked decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, file writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, route, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-080 converted memory cache audit preview evidence into explicit operator decisions without writing files.
